title: McCobblemon
description: My Personal modpack for Cobblemon, based off of the official Cobblemon modpack with a few extra QOL mods and missing some other mods I see as unnecessary.
body:
My Personal modpack for Cobblemon, based off of the official Cobblemon modpack with a few extra QOL mods and missing some other mods I see as unnecessary.

The majority of the mods in this modpack are performance enhancing mods such as Sodium. As well as a my favourite QOL mods: Appleskin, Continuity, Zoomify, and Auth me to name a few.

Additionally my personal favourite shaderpack, and the vanilla tweaks resource pack I use are added to improve visuals.

Finally the most important mod in this modpack is the Cobblemon mod which adds pokemon to minecraft while keeping the same look and feel of vanilla minecraft.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
Cobblemon: https://cobblemon.com/en
